title: erigeron socorrensis
intro: Erigeron socorrensis, also known as Soccorro daisy, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Erigeron socorrensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its potential therapeutic effects.
